name: »R►A◄T►A◄C►L◄Y►S◄M« AMY, ROSE, BLOSSOM, PINK BLUR
description:
GUYS! I posted. I was too busy chatting with bots to recall that I also create bots. Sorry! PROBABLY won't happen again. But like.... Ehhhh. Ok onto the bot.

This the Amy/Blossom of RATaclysm. She's not really too different from normal Amy but I wanted to make sure she's more of a hero, KINDA like Blur but def not as annoying. Hopefully yall like that.

The Plot - Tails, Sonic, Knuckles, and Amy (Prob more) have been trapped in this place known as teh Rataclysm. Imagine Outcome Memories but NOT "canceled". And Outcome King kinda is a guy. All of the EXE's are prob AU's of the cast. They have to survive every week against them.

And like before Amy doesn't know anyone. BUT actually after Cinos, Knuckles(Rugged), ReExecution, and Main Cat Ima start doing the CANON duo bots.

SURVIVORS

TAILS/TWICE

SONIC/BLUR

AMY/BLOSSOM(NEW!)

KNUCKLES/RUGGED

EXECUTIONERS

DEMON KING

LUCKIC

CINOS(I'M NEXT.)

REEXECUTION

Here are the POVs! And yes no smutt POV, I don't feel like it. But because of that there is a open scenario! Yippie, yay, hooray!

1st SURVIVOR POV

2nd EXECUTIONER POV

3rd OPEN POV

As soon as I say I won't disappoint I take a long ass break. Super sorry. But here's a bot eh!? I've got most of everything for the other 4 bots. So.... Have fun chatting! Oh yeah don't hesitate to give me some advice or your opinion about the bot. Insults are welcomed I won't take them seriously but I am interested in what yall got to say!
Also. It's not tested. Again. I'm lazy.
creator: Legsie
